_doc: CANONICAL program state — the SINGLE source for the auto-generated status blocks. Edit THIS, then run `python3 tools/render_state.py --write` to refresh every <!-- BEGIN GENERATED:* --> block across the context docs (README, SESSION_BOOTSTRAP, SESSION_CHECKPOINT, EXPERIMENT_RUNBOOK §0.3, PROGRESS ⑤). Never hand-edit between the GENERATED markers. This is the 'generate-what's-mechanical' half of the anti-drift design (the other half = narrative fingerprints in tools/closeout_fingerprints.json). The pre-commit hook blocks commits where these blocks are stale vs this file.
updated: 2026-06-26 (C10 multi-token FALSIFIER FIRED + c10c diagnosis; AnyEdit-port = operator-gated multi-day choice, D-C10-1/D-C10b-diverse)
north_star: F1 — prove/falsify the 'LLM-as-Database' spec is implementable BEFORE it is built; deliver a ready / not-ready-with-conditions determination. Falsification-first.
current_latest: **DEPLOYMENT TARGET FIXED (operator): `local Intel CPU + batch writes` → F1 re-scoped + first on-target falsifier fired.** Re-scope (advisor-checked for over-rotation): C4/§8.7/D1-incremental DROP from the critical path (incremental-only); **C1 REFRAMES** to batch-genesis-cleanliness-at-scale (gated on target fact-count, NOT deleted); **C10 multi-token values ELEVATED**. **C10 (D-C10-1, CORPUS/35) = FALSIFIER FIRED:** 3-arm novel-insert at the N≤100 batch path (binding = held-out-paraphrase full-sequence) — single-token 97.2% & prior-COHERENT multi-token 97.2% robust, but arbitrary INCOHERENT multi-token values 36.1% (first-token 70.8%; conditional P(full|first)=0.51 vs coherent 1.00). The edit FITS the trained prompt (95.8%) but does NOT GENERALIZE to paraphrases → the multi-token instance of the R13/R5 trained-prompt-parrot axis. **C10 = the FIRST condition both on the critical path for the fixed target AND failing → OPEN MUST-FIX; named fix = AnyEdit per-token editing.** 3 advisor gates + Perplexity cross-family; scoped 3B/band[4-8]/AlphaEdit/N≤100/1-seed/HF-fp16 (single-token + prior-coherent values already robust). F1 net readiness UNCHANGED (NOT-READY-WITH-CONDITIONS) but the target now has a concrete blocker with a known fix to try. ⮕ FOLLOW-UP (c10c, D-C10b-diverse): tested whether paraphrase-diverse training rescues the incoherent failure — it does NOT cleanly (CANON+PTRAIN degraded everything via 3×-request interference → uninformative); replicates C10 (38.9≈36.1). The wall is GENERALIZATION at the continuation position, cleanly localized (single-token 97% → first-of-multi 82% → continuation collapses) — a reasonable mechanistic case FOR the AnyEdit fix (canon=100% is a teacher-forcing artifact, not 'already solved'). AnyEdit port = OPERATOR-GATED (multi-day; mechanistic case but payoff empirically unproven; PORT jianghoucheng/AnyEdit, don't reimplement). Alternative: accept C10 as a documented value-class limitation (single-token + prior-coherent values work today).
next_actions: DEPLOYMENT TARGET = local Intel CPU + batch writes (re-Genesis model). F1 CONCLUDED but the target has a concrete on-critical-path blocker (C10). Operator-steer, in priority:

(1) C10 FIX — OPERATOR-GATED multi-day choice (do not roll in): port AnyEdit-style per-token editing (jianghoucheng/AnyEdit, Qwen2.5-compatible) to target the localized continuation-position gap, then re-test arbitrary multi-token paraphrase full-seq.
